policy_name: Richtlinien der Universität Passau über die Gewährung von Reisekostenzuschüssen

rules.description: Funding is limited to a maximum of 2/3 of the incurred travel costs.
The application must be received by the Graduate Centre BEFORE the trip starts.
Only active participation (Lecture, Poster, or contribution) is funded. Passive attendance or courses are excluded.
Reimbursement claims must be submitted no later than 6 months after the event.
Applicant must be a doctoral student, postdoc, habilitation candidate, or junior professor at the University of Passau.
The grant is subsidiary; it cannot top up other funding and should only be used if no other funding is available.
